title: I launched PyMaster Pro — here's what happened after 1 week
author: Viki
summary:
Hey Dev.to! 👋

A week ago I shared PyMaster Pro — my free
Python learning platform. Here's what happened!

📊 What I achieved in week 1:

  • Launched on Product Hunt
  • 50+ views on Dev.to
  • Google discovered all 5 pages
  • Real users visiting the site!

🔗 https://pymaster-pro.netlify.app

What I learned:

  • Building is easier than marketing
  • Community support is everything
  • Consistency matters more than perfection

Still going strong — what should I add next?
